label: FAIL
rationale: GetACL is specified to fail when the InvokingID/MethodID combination does not exist. The Locking SP AccessControl evidence lists the Locking table table-level Next association and object-level Locking Get/Set associations, not a table-level LockingTable Set association, so returning SUCCESS is not compliant.
